tools.name: generate_qr
tools.description: Generate a static QR code from any text/URL. Returns a PNG image (or SVG markup). Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: create_dynamic_qr
tools.description: Create an editable (dynamic) QR code whose destination you can change later without reprinting. Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: update_dynamic_qr
tools.description: Edit a dynamic QR code: change its destination, label, custom short link (slug), tags or folder. Pass only the fields you want to change. Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: get_scans
tools.description: Get scan statistics for a dynamic QR code. Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: list_dynamic_qr
tools.description: List your dynamic (editable) QR codes — id, short URL, destination, label and status. Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: delete_dynamic_qr
tools.description: Permanently delete a dynamic QR code. The short link stops working. Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: bulk_create_dynamic_qr
tools.description: Create up to 200 dynamic QR codes at once. Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List your folders (id and name). Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a folder to organise codes. Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: delete_folder
tools.description: Delete a folder (its codes are un-filed, not deleted). Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: list_themes
tools.description: List your saved style themes (id, name) — apply one by passing its id or name as `theme` to generate/create/update tools. Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: create_theme
tools.description: Save a reusable style theme. `style` is a QR style object (fgColor, bgColor, dotType, cornerSquareType, etc.). Requires an OpenQR API key.

tools.name: delete_theme
tools.description: Delete a saved theme. Codes already styled with it keep their look. Requires an OpenQR API key.
